# Chapter 11: Climate engineering, mitigation, adaptation  (~120 pp)
- 11.1 Climate as engineered domain whether we want it or not (15) · 11.2 Mitigation engineering: where the most leverage is (15) · 11.3 Adaptation engineering (15) · 11.4 Carbon dioxide removal: the menu (18) · 11.5 Solar radiation management: governance and risk (18) · 11.6 Climate engineering as international issue (15) · 11.7 Failure section: climate-policy failures and what engineers should learn from them (24)

**Archetype**: scaling, ethics, control. **Project**: assess one mitigation pathway's engineering credibility. **Exercises**: 20.
